goal: Consolidate gad self subcommands to exactly 'gad self build' and 'gad self install'. Remove 'gad self refresh'. Build = node scripts/build-bun-release.mjs (Bun only, no SEA fallback). Install = copy dist/release/gad-v<ver>-<platform>-<arch>.exe to %LOCALAPPDATA%/Programs/gad/bin/gad.exe. On Windows lock, print clear error + exit 1 — no PS1 retry shim. Help text documents both verbs.
